data.title: Hong Kong resumes RMB 1.25B bond tender, aiming to boost yuan liquidity via 10-year bonds at 2.29% yield on Feb 5.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has disclosed that on February 5th, they will be holding a tender for 10-year RMB bonds. The bonds will have a yield of 2.29%, as part of a larger initiative supported by China to increase yuan liquidity in the Hong Kong markets. This move aims to bolster the availability of the Chinese currency in Hong Kong and is part of efforts to double the yuan liquidity in the market.

data.title: DOT price at $1.70; RSI oversold. Analysts eye $2.48 recovery by Feb, with $1.59 support test first.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is currently trading at $1.70 and its Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates oversold conditions. Analysts predict a potential recovery up to a resistance level of $2.48, but there is a chance of a bearish trend testing the support level at $1.59 before any significant upward movement.

data.title: DOGE aiming for $0.16 in February. Short-term: $0.12; Medium-term: $0.16-$0.175. Bullish at $0.13, support at $0.11.
data.description: Summary of DOGE Price Predictions:In the short term, Dogecoin's price is anticipated to reach $0.12 within one week. Looking further ahead, the medium-term forecast for the next month places the price in the range of $0.16 to $0.175. Analysts are eyeing a bullish breakout level of $0.13, while cautioning that $0.11 serves as critical support. These predictions suggest potential fluctuations in the Dogecoin market, with varying targets and levels to watch for in upcoming trading sessions.

data.title: News article discusses need for cloud-based mobile automation for scaling social media in 2026 due to mobile platform growth.
data.description: In Singapore on January 30, 2026, it was reported that the shift towards mobile-native social media platforms is impacting scaling strategies originally designed for desktop tools. The growth on platforms such as TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and messaging apps is projected to rely less on traditional methods by the same year. This trend underscores the emergence of mobile platforms as key players in the social media landscape, highlighting a need for innovative approaches to accommodate the shift.
The Russian Armed Forces have ‘liberated’ the populated settlement of Ternovatoe in the Zaporizhia region and Bereostok in the Donetsk People's Republic, the Russian Defense Ministry reported.
From January 24 to 30, in response to Ukraine's attacks, massive and six group strikes were carried out against defense industry enterprises, the Russian Defense Ministry reported.

data.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals likely to report lower Q4 earnings with $10.74 per share, down from $12.07. Quarterly revenue estimated at $3.79 billion. Collaborated with Tessera Therapeutics for TSRA-196 development. Stock fell 0.2% to $749.44.
data.description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings on Friday, Jan. 30, before the market opens. Analysts are predicting earnings of $10.74 per share for the Tarrytown-based company, a decrease from $12.07 per share in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals' quarterly revenue stands at $3.79 billion, consistent with the previous year’s figures. In a recent joint venture with Tessera Therapeutics, Inc., Regeneron Pharmaceuticals revealed plans to collaborate on the development and commercialization of TSRA-196. The company's stock saw a minor decline of 0.2%, closing at $749.44 on Thursday.
